name: Salmon Manicotti
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces frozen chopped broccoli, cooked, drained
1/2 pound cottage cheese, 0.5% fat, or ricotta
recipeInstructions:
1. For the sauce, blend flour and milk together until smooth. Add seasonings and cook, stirring constantly, until it thickens. Remove from heat and stir in lemon juice.
2. Drain salmon and mash. Combine cheese and egg. Stir in salmon and broccoli.
3. Fill manicotti with the mixture. Cover the bottom of a shallow baking dish with a small amount of sauce.
4. Arrange the manicotti over the sauce.
5. Top with remaining sauce and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese. Bake 30-35 minutes at 350°F.
